name: Coastal Shrimp Fresh Rolls
description: Light and refreshing rice paper rolls filled with tender shrimp, vermicelli noodles, and crisp herbs. Served with a savory peanut dipping sauce for a perfect balance of fresh and rich.

name: Golden Crunch Egg Rolls
description: Crispy, golden-fried rolls packed with seasoned vegetables and wrapped to perfection. Served hot with a sweet chili dipping sauce for that irresistible crunch.

name: Dragon Fire Sushi Roll
description: A bold sushi roll layered with fresh fish and topped with a sweet and spicy glaze, finished with sesame seeds. Rich, flavorful, and slightly fiery with every bite.

name: Garden Glow Veggie Rolls
description: Vibrant rice paper rolls packed with a colorful mix of fresh vegetables and herbs. Light, crisp, and served with a refreshing dipping sauce for a clean, healthy bite.

name: Zesty Shrimp Power Bowl
description: A vibrant bowl loaded with juicy shrimp, crisp vegetables, creamy avocado, and crunchy peanuts over a hearty base. Tossed in a light, zesty sauce for a fresh and satisfying bite.

name: Spicy Street Noodle Bowl
description: Rich, savory noodles served in a bold, spicy broth with tender beef and hearty vegetables. Packed with deep flavor and just the right kick to warm you up.

name: Sunset Splash Refresher
description: A trio of vibrant, fruit-forward iced refreshers bursting with sweet and tangy flavors. Light, colorful, and perfect for cooling down with every sip.

name: Umami Dip Sauce
description: A rich, savory dipping sauce with deep umami flavor and a hint of sweetness. Perfect for enhancing every bite of rolls and dumplings.

name: Spicy Dragon Cream Sauce
description: A creamy, bold sauce swirled with chili heat and subtle sweetness. Smooth, spicy, and addictive—perfect for dipping or drizzling.
